issues_found: Source is a listing/index page aggregating all 2013 Federal Reserve press releases - not an individual archiveable document
Per CORE RULE 5: PAGE_TYPE listing_page mandates rejection
Per CORE RULE 6: Container/listing pages bias toward reject
Contains no coherent narrative or substantive analysis - only a chronological index of disparate items
Published date (2013-12-27) is approximately 12+ years before TODAY and lacks standalone archival value as a listing page
human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies the source as a non-archiveable listing page and correctly recommends rejection. No human judgment needed - the violation of CORE RULE 5 (listing_page type) and CORE RULE 6 (container page) is clear and unambiguous.

corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This listing page aggregates hundreds of disparate 2013 Fed press releases and is not itself an archiveable research document. Individual items within it (FOMC statements from 12/18/2013, FOMC projections, Volcker rule final rules from 12/10/2013, market risk capital rule from 12/6/2013) are candidates for separate archival.
